valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Tue 23 Jun 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Wed 24 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: High German Bight 1023 dissipating. New high expected Shannon 1021 by midday tomorrow. New low expected FitzRoy 1011 by same time
